name: tradingview-mcp-thaqif
description: Bridge TradingView Desktop to Claude for Pine Script, FCPO/futures, and Wyckoff multi-timeframe analysis.
long_description: A local MCP server that connects to your running TradingView Desktop app via the Chrome DevTools Protocol. Read chart state, indicator values, and custom Pine output; develop and compile Pine Script v5/v6; manage alerts; and run a Wyckoff multi-timeframe morning brief driven by your rules.json. Requires your own valid TradingView subscription. No autonomous trade execution.

cdp_port.title: TradingView CDP port
cdp_port.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol port that TradingView Desktop is listening on (only change if you launched it on a custom port).
